Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The user wants an analysis of an event log based on a provided process description The analysis needs to identify normative violations desiderata failures and suggest interpretations justifications for these behaviors

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deconstruct the Process Rules Normative vs Desiderata Normative Strict Rules Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Credit Check MUST be before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment MUST be before Loan Decision Inform Applicant MUST be after Loan Decision If Approved Finalize Documentation MUST occur before Close Case If Rejected DO NOT finalize documentation before closing No skipping steps no reversing order no contradictory actions Desiderata Recommended Rules Credit Check within 24 hours of Application Received Inform Applicant within 48 hours of Loan Decision Perform a Follow up Call before closing the case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Event Log Case by Case Case 1 Trace Application Received 0900 Credit Check 0930 Risk Assessment 1000 Loan Decision Approved 1100 Inform Applicant 1300 Finalize Documentation 1330 Close Case 1400 Normative Check Order is correct Approved Finalized Doc Close Case No violations Desiderata Check Credit check within 24h Yes 30 mins Inform within 48h Yes 2 hours Follow up call No Conclusion No normative violations Fails desiderata missing Follow up Call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Trace Application Received 0800 Risk Assessment 0820 Credit Check 0900 Loan Decision Rejected 0930 Finalize Documentation 1000 Close Case 1030 Normative Check Order Risk Assessment happened before Credit Check Violation Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation Violation contradictory action Missing Inform Applicant Violation skipped step Desiderata Check Missing follow up call but that is moot given the severe normative violations Conclusion Severe normative violations order logic skipping

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 Trace Application Received Jan 12 0900 Credit Check Jan 14 1000 Risk Assessment Jan 14 1100 Loan Decision Approved Jan 14 1200 Inform Applicant Jan 16 1500 Finalize Documentation Jan 17 0900 Close Case Jan 17 1000 Normative Check Sequence is correct Approved Finalized Close No violations Desiderata Check Credit check within 24h No App received Jan 12 0900 Credit check Jan 14 1000 49 hours Inform within 48h No Decision Jan 14 1200 Inform Jan 16 1500 51 hours Follow up call No Conclusion No normative violations Fails all three desiderata

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Structure the Response Part 1 Normative Violations Go through each case state if it violates normative rules and explain exactly which rules were broken based on the deconstructed list Part 2 Desiderata Failures Go through each case state if it fails to meet recommended practices and list the specific failures Emphasize that these are suboptimal but not severe Part 3 Interpretations Justifications Brainstorm realistic business reasons for the observed deviations

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Case 2 Why Risk Assessment before Credit Check Maybe an automated pre screening based on internal data Or a severe process failure training issue Why Finalize Doc after Rejection Maybe a system glitch or they started preparing docs before the final rejection came through or Finalize here meant closing out the rejected file terminology confusion Why no Inform Applicant Maybe the applicant was informed verbally during the Finalize Documentation step or a system failure prevented the logging sending of the notification

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Case 3 Why delays Backlog weekend processing waiting for applicant to provide additional info Why no Follow up call High workload forgotten or deemed unnecessary since the loan was approved and docs were signed

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Draft the Content Iterative refinement for clarity and tone Self Correction during drafting Make sure to explicitly state that Case 1 has no normative violations Clearly separate normative from desiderata Ensure the tone reflects the severity difference strict vs recommended Final Polish Check against all user prompts Did I identify normative violations and explain Yes Did I identify desiderata failures and clarify they are not severe Yes Did I suggest interpretations Yes
